name: Manish Patel
context: TatvaSoft is a CMMi Level 3 and Microsoft Solutions Partner custom software development company founded in 2001 and headquartered in Ahmedabad, India. The company specializes in delivering end-to-end IT solutions including custom web and mobile application development, enterprise software, AI and Generative AI solutions, cloud computing, DevOps, IoT, and software testing and QA. With over two decades of experience, TatvaSoft has successfully completed 1800+ projects across diverse industry verticals such as healthcare, fintech, retail, education, logistics, energy, and the public sector. The company serves clients ranging from startups to large enterprises globally, offering dedicated development teams, system integration, CRM and ERP implementations, and cutting-edge technology services in areas like blockchain, big data analytics, AR/VR, and edge computing. TatvaSoft focuses on innovation, quality delivery, and digital transformation to help businesses stay competitive and achieve their strategic objectives.Cygnet One, formerly known as Cygnet Infotech, is a leading technology company headquartered in Ahmedabad, India, with a team of 1,000 to 5,000 professionals. The company specializes in enterprise-grade IT services including software development, product engineering, cloud transformation, DevOps and CI/CD automation, robotic process automation (RPA), tax technology, and test automation. Cygnet offers a suite of proprietary products such as AutomationWhiz, Cygnature (digital signature), TestingWhiz, and a Vendor Portal Management system. The company serves enterprises across industries like BFSI, healthcare, manufacturing, retail, and logistics, helping them modernize legacy systems, reduce infrastructure costs, and accelerate time-to-market. With expertise in SAP, Salesforce, Microsoft technologies, AI, and fintech solutions, Cygnet partners with organizations to drive digital excellence, streamline operations, and enable cloud-native transformation across hybrid and multi-cloud environments.
